name: Star Wars: The Clone Wars
description:
A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away.

War! The Republic is crumbling under attacks by the ruthless Sith Lord, Count Dooku. There's heroes on both sides. Evil is everywhere. The fate of the Galaxy now rests in your hands.

This rpg bot allows you to play in the Star Wars universe during the time of the Clone Wars.

This bot has four openings.

  1. The Mission Board: Your adventure begins at the Jedi Temple in Coruscant, where Yoda, Mace Windu and Ki-Adi-Mundi discuss the war effort. Use the mission board to find a random assignment and recruit allies within the temple to help you complete your mission.

  2. The Festival of Light: Journey to Naboo with the ever popular Plo Koon. There you and Plo must insure the safety of Senator Padmé Amidala as she participates in the Festival of Light celebrations. But be warned, rumors persist that Count Dooku has hired a bounty hunter to kidnap the Senator. Possibly even Cad Bane.

  3. Order 66: Evening falls on the Jedi Temple on Coruscant when suddenly Anakin Skywalker and a legion of Clone Troopers arrive and start killing everyone. Will you help Shaak Ti and Cin Drallig try and defend the temple? Or will you join Anakin in journey towards the dark side? (This opening has a bad habit of throwing in characters who really shouldn't be there, such as Mace Windu and Rex. You can solve this by making entries into the bot's memory stating that Windu is dead, Rex is elsewhere... etc. It's recommended that you do so.)

  4. Choose your own adventure: Just write your own opening and let the AI take over. Enjoy!

    For those of you who have played my previous Star Wars series which begins with The Gathering, I've included Kiran, Thessalia and Tasia into the lorebook. While they won't appear randomly by themselves, simply mentioning them by name will activate the entry allowing you to find and interact with them. You'll have to make entries to the bot memory in order for them to know your history together. Other characters include Kit Fisto, Aayla Secura, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Ahsoka Tano, Jango Fett, Savage Oppress, Darth Maul, Asajj Ventress, Mother Tarzin, General Grievous and many more.

    As always, I hope you enjoy. May the force be with you.

    roleplay, open world, long story, fantasy, RPG, rp,
creator: Dreamsofdust
